title: WebShaper: Formalization-Driven Data Synthesis for Information-Seeking Agents

defines.name: WebShaper
defines.definition: A formalization-driven data synthesis framework and dataset construction approach for information-seeking agents that uses set-theoretic task formalization to generate consistent training data.

problem: Existing information-driven data synthesis methods produce sparse and difficult-to-verify training data with mismatches between information structure, reasoning structure, and question-answer consistency.
